title: Pizza Delight
description: An Farmer's Delight addon which adds Pizza.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6745d24f138e3843e9c8bef85852b1f4308daaec.png)

**Pizza delight** is an exciting addon for [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) that adds cheese, sausages, and pizza to your Minecraft world.

Craft all the ingredients for delicious pizza either:  
- **Automatically** with **Create's** advanced machinery and contraptions, or  
- **Manually** with **Farmer's Delight** tools like the cutting board and cooking pot.  

---

### 📦 Important: Required Mods  
To use **Pizza delight**, you must have the following mods installed:  
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)  
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)  

Without these, the mod will not work.  

---

### 💡 Recommended Mods  
It’s recommended to also use either:  
- [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice/versions) **or** [Create Central Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-central-kitchen/versions)  

Both let you handle **Farmer's Delight** food processing with **Create**.

---

Combine automation and culinary creativity with **Pizza delight** and take your Minecraft cooking to the next level!
